title: Looking for Category Manager at Grofers

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Grofers
jsonLd.description:
Join the Grofers family as a Category Manager in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
